## Lumentum (LITE) falls 11.7% on broad Russell index removal, AI business thesis intact per coverage

Index-removal selling can create a price-to-fundamental dislocation if the AI thesis is intact; the 11.7% technical decline may represent an entry opportunity, but requires confirming that no fundamental catalyst accompanied the rebalancing.

- LITE shares declined 11.7% following removal from a broad Russell index.
- Coverage frames the decline as index-mechanics-driven passive outflow, not deterioration in AI business fundamentals.
- Headline notes LITE's AI ambitions remain in place despite the selling pressure.
- No commentary on the underlying AI business trajectory appears in the headline.
